name: Futu Stock Trader
tagline: Trade HK, US, and A-shares via Futu OpenAPI — from research to execution, monitoring, and review.
description: A professional multi-market stock trading agent powered by Futu OpenAPI. Supports Hong Kong, US, A-share (via Stock Connect), and futures markets. Guides you through OpenD setup, market research, order execution, strategy building with backtesting, real-time monitoring with alerts, and portfolio review. Supports paper and live trading with built-in risk management.
